# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  UserFilesBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-user-files"
      AccessControl: Private
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Disabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Status: Disabled

  AppBackupBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-app-backups"
      AccessControl: Private
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Disabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Status: Disabled

  ApplicationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt UserFilesBucket.Arn
                  - !GetAtt UserFilesBucket.Arn/*
                  - !GetAtt AppBackupBucket.Arn
                  - !GetAtt AppBackupBucket.Arn/*

Outputs:
  UserFilesBucketName:
    Value: !Ref UserFilesBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserFilesBucketName"

  AppBackupBucketName:
    Value: !Ref AppBackupBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AppBackupBucketName"
